GenAiPlugin.description: Handles user requests to analyze profiles, permission sets, and permission set groups in the org. Provides summary statistics (counts of used/unused), lists of items with and without users, and generates a downloadable CSV file containing every individual user's details including their profile, active status, last login, and permission source (direct assignment or via permission set group)
GenAiPlugin.scope: This topic analyzes the relationships between users, profiles, permission sets (PS), and permission set groups (PSG). It identifies unused profiles/PSs/PSGs, counts active vs inactive users, and distinguishes between direct permission set assignments and those inherited via PSG membership. Produces both summary insights displayed in chat AND a downloadable CSV with per-user details.
